summary: Build referral programs for SaaS/digital products. Covers reward structures (two-sided, tiered, multi-step), platform selection (Rewardful, ReferralCandy, Viral Loops, FirstPromoter), technical implementation (tracking, attribution, API patterns), fraud prevention, email templates, and KPI metrics. Use for designing viral growth loops, implementing refer-a-friend features, or optimizing existing referral systems.
title: akm:referral-program-building
